content.json:
# LLM Token Billing Dashboard

Real-time token consumption metrics from Azure API Management AI Gateway.
Metrics flow: **APIM emit-metric** → **App Insights customMetrics** → **this workbook**.

---

parameters.name: SubscriptionFilter
parameters.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'Total Tokens'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend d = parse_json(customDimensions)
| distinct tostring(d['Subscription ID'])
parameters.label: APIM Subscription

content.query:
let subFilter = dynamic([{SubscriptionFilter}]);
customMetrics
| where name == 'Total Tokens'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend d = parse_json(customDimensions)
| extend sub = tostring(d['Subscription ID'])
| where array_length(subFilter) == 0 or '*' in (subFilter) or sub in (subFilter)
| summarize TotalTokens=sum(value)
| project strcat(format_decimal(TotalTokens, 0))
content.title: Total Tokens Consumed

content.query:
let subFilter = dynamic([{SubscriptionFilter}]);
customMetrics
| where name == 'Prompt Tokens'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend d = parse_json(customDimensions)
| extend sub = tostring(d['Subscription ID'])
| where array_length(subFilter) == 0 or '*' in (subFilter) or sub in (subFilter)
| summarize PromptTokens=sum(value)
| project strcat(format_decimal(PromptTokens, 0))
content.title: Prompt Tokens (Input)

content.query:
let subFilter = dynamic([{SubscriptionFilter}]);
customMetrics
| where name == 'Completion Tokens'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend d = parse_json(customDimensions)
| extend sub = tostring(d['Subscription ID'])
| where array_length(subFilter) == 0 or '*' in (subFilter) or sub in (subFilter)
| summarize CompletionTokens=sum(value)
| project strcat(format_decimal(CompletionTokens, 0))
content.title: Completion Tokens (Output)

content.query:
let subFilter = dynamic([{SubscriptionFilter}]);
customMetrics
| where name == 'Total Tokens'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend d = parse_json(customDimensions)
| extend sub = tostring(d['Subscription ID'])
| where array_length(subFilter) == 0 or '*' in (subFilter) or sub in (subFilter)
| summarize APIcalls=count()
| project strcat(format_decimal(APIcalls, 0))
content.title: API Calls

content.query:
let subFilter = dynamic([{SubscriptionFilter}]);
customMetrics
| where name in ('Total Tokens', 'Prompt Tokens', 'Completion Tokens')
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend d = parse_json(customDimensions)
| extend sub = tostring(d['Subscription ID'])
| where array_length(subFilter) == 0 or '*' in (subFilter) or sub in (subFilter)
| summarize Tokens=sum(value) by bin(timestamp, 5m), name
| render timechart
content.title: All Token Types — 5-Minute Intervals

content.query:
let subFilter = dynamic([{SubscriptionFilter}]);
customMetrics
| where name in ('Prompt Tokens', 'Completion Tokens')
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend d = parse_json(customDimensions)
| extend sub = tostring(d['Subscription ID'])
| where array_length(subFilter) == 0 or '*' in (subFilter) or sub in (subFilter)
| summarize Tokens=sum(value) by name
| render piechart
content.title: Input vs Output Token Distribution

content.query:
let subFilter = dynamic([{SubscriptionFilter}]);
customMetrics
| where name in ('Total Tokens', 'Prompt Tokens', 'Completion Tokens')
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend d = parse_json(customDimensions)
| extend sub = tostring(d['Subscription ID'])
| where array_length(subFilter) == 0 or '*' in (subFilter) or sub in (subFilter)
| extend subscriptionName = tostring(d['Subscription Name'])
| summarize Tokens=sum(value), Calls=count() by name, sub, subscriptionName
| project Subscription=coalesce(subscriptionName, sub), MetricName=name, Tokens, Calls
| order by Subscription asc, MetricName asc
content.title: Token Breakdown by Subscription

content.query:
let subFilter = dynamic([{SubscriptionFilter}]);
let costPerToken = 0.00000015;
customMetrics
| where name == 'Total Tokens'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend d = parse_json(customDimensions)
| extend sub = tostring(d['Subscription ID'])
| where array_length(subFilter) == 0 or '*' in (subFilter) or sub in (subFilter)
| extend subscriptionName = tostring(d['Subscription Name'])
| extend tenantId = tostring(d['Tenant ID'])
| summarize TotalTokens=sum(value), Calls=count() by subscriptionName, tenantId
| extend EstimatedCostUSD=round(TotalTokens * costPerToken, 6)
| extend AvgTokensPerCall=round(TotalTokens / Calls, 0)
| project Tenant=coalesce(subscriptionName, tenantId), TotalTokens, Calls, AvgTokensPerCall, EstimatedCostUSD
| order by TotalTokens desc
content.title: Tenant Chargeback Summary (GPT-5.4-mini @ $0.15/1M tokens)

content.query:
let subFilter = dynamic([{SubscriptionFilter}]);
customMetrics
| where name == 'Total Tokens'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend d = parse_json(customDimensions)
| extend sub = tostring(d['Subscription ID'])
| where array_length(subFilter) == 0 or '*' in (subFilter) or sub in (subFilter)
| extend subscriptionName = tostring(d['Subscription Name'])
| summarize TotalTokens=sum(value) by bin(timestamp, 5m), subscriptionName
| render barchart
content.title: Token Consumption by Tenant Over Time

content.query:
let subFilter = dynamic([{SubscriptionFilter}]);
customMetrics
| where name == 'Total Tokens'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend d = parse_json(customDimensions)
| extend sub = tostring(d['Subscription ID'])
| where array_length(subFilter) == 0 or '*' in (subFilter) or sub in (subFilter)
| extend clientIP = tostring(d['Client IP'])
| extend apiId = tostring(d['API ID'])
| extend subscriptionName = tostring(d['Subscription Name'])
| extend tenantId = tostring(d['Tenant ID'])
| project Timestamp=timestamp, Tokens=value, Tenant=tenantId, Subscription=subscriptionName, API=apiId, ClientIP=clientIP
| order by Timestamp desc
| take 50
content.title: Recent API Calls — Raw Detail (last 50)

content.query:
let subFilter = dynamic([{SubscriptionFilter}]);
customMetrics
| where name == 'Total Tokens'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend d = parse_json(customDimensions)
| extend sub = tostring(d['Subscription ID'])
| where array_length(subFilter) == 0 or '*' in (subFilter) or sub in (subFilter)
| summarize Calls=count(), AvgTokens=round(avg(value), 0), MaxTokens=max(value), MinTokens=min(value), P50=round(percentile(value, 50), 0), P95=round(percentile(value, 95), 0), P99=round(percentile(value, 99), 0)
| project Calls, AvgTokens, MinTokens, P50, P95, P99, MaxTokens
content.title: Token Distribution Statistics

content.query:
let subFilter = dynamic([{SubscriptionFilter}]);
let costPerToken = 0.00000015;
customMetrics
| where name == 'Total Tokens'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend d = parse_json(customDimensions)
| extend sub = tostring(d['Subscription ID'])
| where array_length(subFilter) == 0 or '*' in (subFilter) or sub in (subFilter)
| extend subscriptionName = tostring(d['Subscription Name'])
| summarize Tokens=sum(value), Calls=count() by bin(timestamp, 1h), subscriptionName
| extend CostUSD=round(Tokens * costPerToken, 4)
| project timestamp, Tenant=subscriptionName, Tokens, Calls, CostUSD
| order by timestamp desc, CostUSD desc
content.title: Hourly Cost Breakdown by Tenant

content.json:
---

*Data source: `customMetrics` table in App Insights via APIM `emit-metric` policy*\
*Namespace: `LLM Token Metrics` | Metrics: Total Tokens, Prompt Tokens, Completion Tokens*\
*Cost estimate uses GPT-5.4-mini pricing ($0.15 / 1M input tokens). Actual costs vary by model and token type.*
